meta.title: Navy SEAL who oversaw Bin Laden raid pens children’s book & Other Top Stories From Sandboxx News
meta.description:
It's Friday 26 February 2021.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

Congress creates new special operations and intelligence subcommittee
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/37QAnLE


This incredible World War II hero was the first Navy SEAL
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2ZVS88i

Green Beret killed in Jordan receives Silver Star
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/3dRfcNw

Navy SEAL who oversaw Bin Laden raid pens children’s book
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/3dVSSCB

 Shoot house ‘fail’ video gets 10th Mountain Division’s attention
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/3aUNg9I

The Air Force wants a new fighter to fill in for the F-35
Get the full story 👉 http://sbxx.us/2ZTEAKh

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.
